entries.name: ProjectID
entries.definition: A unique ID for each project (all the phases, segments, expansions, etc. belonging to the same overall pipeline do not necesssarily share a ProjectID, but they should share the same PipelineName)

entries.name: Fuel
entries.definition: Oil, Gas, NGL, or other fuel types

entries.name: StartPrefecture/District
entries.definition: Prefecture or district the pipeline starts in

entries.name: EndState/Province
entries.definition: State or province the pipeline ends in

entries.name: Countries
entries.definition: Countries that the pipeline passes through, in order from beginning to end (where possible); note Hong Kong and Macao are recognized as sovereign states here

entries.name: Wiki
entries.definition: Link to project's GEM.wiki page

entries.name: PipelineName
entries.definition: Name of the pipeline (or pipeline system, when it has multiple pieces, phases, segments, or expansions)

entries.name: SegmentName
entries.definition: Name of the pipeline segment (which can be a segment of a bigger pipeline system/network, or an expansion project)

entries.name: Status
entries.definition:
Operating, Proposed, Retired, Construction, Shelved, Cancelled, Idle, or Mothballed

If there have been no development updates in the two years following the project's proposal, then the status is assumed to be "Shelved". If there have been no development updates in the 4 years following the project's proposal or longer, the status is assumed to be "Cancelled". If Shelved, Cancelled, or Retired, these are associated with ShelvedYear, CancelledYear, and StopYear

entries.name: Owner
entries.definition: Auto-filled: direct owner name(s), percent ownership if available; here "owner" means lowest level of ownership that we're able to find in our research.

entries.name: Parent
entries.definition: Parent company name(s) and percent ownership where available, based on owner list. Data from the GEM Ownership Tracker.

entries.name: OwnerEntityIDs
entries.definition: Specific owner entity ID from the GEM Ownership Tracker.

entries.name: ProposalYear
entries.definition: Year the project was first proposed

entries.name: ConstructionYear
entries.definition: Year construction began, or (if Status="Proposed") expected to begin

entries.name: Diameter
entries.definition: Pipeline's diameter (without units); when multiple values are reported, they are separated by a comma

entries.name: DiameterUnits
entries.definition: Pipeline's diameter units

entries.name: StartYear1
entries.definition: First year operations initiated, or expected to initiate

entries.name: StartYear2
entries.definition: Year operations re-initiated, or are expected to re-initiate

entries.name: StartYear3
entries.definition: Year operations re-initiated, or are expected to re-initiate

entries.name: CancelledYear
entries.definition: If Status=Cancelled, the year this became true

entries.name: DelayType
entries.definition: If Delayed=Yes, DelayType is either Presumed or Confirmed. Presumed is when there's not concrete evidence or announcement of the delay; Confirmed for when there has been reporting or a statement by the pipeline owners

entries.name: StopYear
entries.definition: Year operations ended (if Status="Mothballed", Status="Idle", or Status="Retired") or the year the project was cancelled (if Status="Cancelled"). If Status="Cancelled" due to 4-year rule* (as opposed to a formal cancellation), then StopYear="presumed"

entries.name: ShelvedYear
entries.definition: If Status=Shelved, the year this became true

entries.name: Capacity
entries.definition: Maximum potential capacity

entries.name: CapacityUnits
entries.definition: Units that "Capacity" is reported in (bpd, bcm/year, mtpa, MMcf/d, or TJ/d)

entries.name: CapacityBOEd
entries.definition: Capacity converted to barrels of oil equivalent (BOE) per day

entries.name: LengthKnown
entries.definition: Publicly available length (without units)

entries.name: LengthKnownUnits
entries.definition: Publicly available length units (mi or km)

entries.name: LengthKnownKm
entries.definition: Publicly available length, converted to km

entries.name: LengthEstimateKm
entries.definition: Estimated length in km, calulated using route coordinates with Geopandas Python package and taken from "Length Estimates by Pipeline" tab)

entries.name: LengthMergedKm
entries.definition: Merge between LengthKnownKm and LengthEstimateKm (LengthKnownKm is priotized when available; otherwise LengthEstimateKm is used).

entries.name: Diameter [ref]
entries.definition: Separate multiple URLs by a comma and a space ("URL1, URL2, URL3, ..."). If it's a government report or other document that you've downloaded as a PDF, please upload it into the Web Archive and copy/paste its uploaded URL here.

entries.name: FuelSource
entries.definition: Name of oil or gas field, or pipeline, the fuel is sourced from

entries.name: StartLocation
entries.definition: Town, city, or village the pipeline starts in

entries.name: StartCountry
entries.definition: Country the pipeline starts in

entries.name: StartSubRegion
entries.definition: Pipeline's start subregion. Regions and subregions are as defined by the United Nations Statistics Division, in their M49 specification.

entries.name: StartRegion
entries.definition: Pipeline's start region. Regions and subregions are as defined by the United Nations Statistics Division, in their M49 specification.

entries.name: EndLocation
entries.definition: Town, city, or village the pipeline ends in

entries.name: EndPrefecture/District
entries.definition: Prefecture or district the pipeline ends in

entries.name: EndCountry
entries.definition: Country the pipeline ends in

entries.name: CostUSD
entries.definition: Cost of construction converted to USD

entries.name: EndRegion
entries.definition: Pipeline's end region. Regions and subregions are as defined by the United Nations Statistics Division, in their M49 specification.

entries.name: CostEuro
entries.definition: Cost of construction converted to Euro

entries.name: OtherLanguagePrimaryPipelineName
entries.definition: Primary name in other relevant search language.

entries.name: EndSubRegion
entries.definition: Pipeline's end subregion. Regions and subregions are as defined by the United Nations Statistics Division, in their M49 specification.

entries.name: RouteType
entries.definition: Identifies the type of route; choose from the list of options.

entries.name: RouteAccuracy
entries.definition:
low: basic point A to point B connection
medium: route is not a straight line, but hasn't been traced
high: route has been digitally traced in GIS software or the shapefile has been obtained from a reliable source
no route: we don't have a route for it, either because it's unavailabe/unknown or is a capacity/directionality expansion

entries.name: Cost
entries.definition: Cost of the project (either estimated or actual)

entries.name: CostUnits
entries.definition: Cost units/currency 3-letter code name (USD, EUR, etc.)

entries.name: LastUpdated
entries.definition: Date this was last checked/updated (filled in by Researcher)
